resources.string: ART Hook detection + Stack frame analysis
Automatically start app on boot or schedule
Auto-start only works in exported APKs. Some devices require manual authorization in system settings.
Continue running in background after exit
Prevent system sleep to maintain background tasks
Display running status in notification bar
🔋 Disable battery optimization for reliable auto-start
Enforced controls for volume, lights, and performance
⚠️ Warning: Enabling these features may cause overheating or battery drain. Proceed with caution. Some features require special permissions.
The following features may affect device stability. Use with caution.\n⚠️ Supported only on certain devices; results vary.
Automatically start this app after device boot
Official Google browser with excellent performance
Inject micro-frequency offsets into audio analysis data
Intercept matchMedia to spoof prefers-color-scheme / motion
Inject noise into measureText to prevent font fingerprinting
Automatically propagate disguise to new iframes
Supplement missing WebView Notification API and spoof status
Lower performance.now() precision to prevent timing attacks
All hook functions return [native code] on toString()
The engine modifies browser fingerprint API returns via JS injection. Level 1 (Basic) is always active. Higher levels add noise and deeper protection. Note: Extreme settings may break some websites.
Replace GPU info with standard PC values
Prevent RTCPeerConnection from leaking local IP address
Official Microsoft browser based on Chromium
Tencent WebView solution with good compatibility
Reflection + Dynamic Proxy for critical calls
Prevent MITM attacks by locking server certs
Open system settings to change default WebView (requires Developer Options)
Are you sure you want to clear all hosts rules?
App will exit automatically when countdown reaches zero
Format: on_ms, off_ms, on_ms, off_ms...\ne.g., 100,100,100,100,100,800 = 3 quick flashes + long pause
Are you sure you want to delete this script?
This will delete all downloaded runtimes and cache files. You will need to re-download them later. Continue?
One-click download of all missing components (~50MB)
Affects download speed for PHP, WordPress, and Node.js
Check if developer options are enabled
Detect network proxies and VPN connections
Settings → About Phone → Tap "Build Number" 7 times
Manually configure device name, model, and resolution
Select a device to auto-generate corresponding fingerprint and User-Agent.
Obfuscate logic flow to hinder static analysis
Split DEX into encrypted chunks; dynamic reassembly
Convert critical code into custom randomized instruction sets
Pretend to be a system app to prevent standard uninstallation
No limit — higher values increase impact
Show multiple icons on home screen after installation
Set number of home screen icons (each launches the app)
Multi-icon functionality uses Android\'s activity-alias mechanism. No extra permissions required.
Download independent engine to bundle with APK
Allows exit via password during enforced runs
Inject fake data to mislead reverse engineers
Wipe sensitive data upon severe threat detection
Using GeckoView adds ~%s MB to APK size
Are you sure you want to delete the engine files?
GeckoView engine not found; download it in Kernel settings
Firefox engine with built-in privacy and ad blocking
Choose browser engine for exported APK
Use device\'s built-in Android WebView (Zero extra size)
Enable minigames while waiting for connection
Select a professionally designed error page style
Pages shown when network is unavailable
⚠ Exact alarm permission required for scheduled starts
Enforce app run during specific time intervals
Full black screen with touch input disabled
Disconnect all devices and power off Bluetooth
Disable cellular network (subject to device support)
Power off WiFi and prevent reconnection
High CPU usage; increased heat and battery drain
Programmatic hotspot creation with auto-version adaptation
Keep app running during specified period; exit is blocked
Warning: Once active, the app cannot be closed until the time ends. Set an emergency password to avoid being locked out. Ideal for deep work or kiosk modes.
Standard + VMP + Control Flow + RASP + Memory Protection
Basic + SO Protection + String Encryption + Environment Detection
Use hosts files to block ad domains
Import hosts files to block domains. Supports standard and AdBlock formats.
Enter URL of the hosts file
Creates isolated browser environments for each app, including randomized fingerprints and spoofed headers. Ideal for managing multiple accounts and preventing tracking.
Interactive menu shown on long-pressing web content
Desktop-style context menu; compact and efficient
Circular bubble menu at click coordinates
Basic options: Save Image / Copy Link
HMAC tagging of critical data with periodic validation
No matching scripts for this page
Explore script market for more utilities
One-tap extreme: Max Vol + Max Vib + Strobe + Max Perf + Block Keys
📱 %s device detected; please whitelist this app in system manager for reliable auto-start
Inject always-true/false conditions + dead logic paths
Convert images to WebP to reduce size by 30-50%
Cache optimized assets to prevent redundant processing
Delay loading of off-screen images to speed up first paint
Minify JS/CSS/SVG; remove comments and whitespace
Auto-add defer attributes to prevent render-blocking
Utilize multi-core CPU for asset processing
Inject preconnect/dns-prefetch hints for faster downloads
Strip unneeded locales and assets from template APK
Inject scripts for scroll optimization, memory management, and CDN preconnection
Comprehensive optimization: assets, builds, and loading speed
Are you sure you want to terminate all running services?
Are you sure you want to terminate this service?
Install these to enable as WebView provider in Dev Options
Generate new fingerprint every time the app opens
Verify resource files via SHA-256 hashing
Automatically start the app at designated times

The current launcher may not support creating shortcuts. Please check home screen settings or app permissions.\n\nClick \'Go to Settings\' to open the app details page and check for relevant permission options.
Detected Huawei/Honor phone. You need to enable \'Create Desktop Shortcut\' permission.\n\nGo to: Settings > Apps > App Management > WebToApp > Permissions > Create Desktop Shortcut
Detected Meizu phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.\n\nGo to: Phone Manager > Permission Management > WebToApp > Desktop Shortcut
Detected OPPO phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.\n\nGo to: Settings > App Management > WebToApp > Permissions > Desktop Shortcut
Detected Samsung phone. Please ensure the home screen is unlocked for editing.\n\nYou can also long-press the app icon and select \'Add to Home Screen\' to create a shortcut.
Detected vivo phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission.\n\nGo to: i Manager > App Management > Permission Management > WebToApp > Desktop Shortcut

Detected Xiaomi/Redmi phone. You need to enable \'Desktop Shortcut\' permission to create app shortcuts.\n\nGo to: Settings > App Settings > App Management > WebToApp > Permission Management > Desktop Shortcut
Strip real symbols; inject fake ones to mislead analysts
One-tap ghost: Mute + Black Screen + Block Touch + Offline + BT Off
AES + Custom Base64 + XOR triple encryption
Supported: China, USA, Japan, Korea, UK, Germany, France, Russia, Brazil, India, Australia, Canada, Singapore, HK, Taiwan, Europe, Asia
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
Inject custom JavaScript; similar to Tampermonkey
Select scripts to enable for this app
Note: Changing WebView provider requires Developer Options
Prevent real IP leaks via WebRTC
